mapper.sql: id, gids, user, uid, ndate, total, gnames, address, note, statecn, gcounts
mapper.insert: insert into wct_bill (id, gids, user, uid, ndate, total, gnames, address, note, statecn, gcounts) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{gids,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{user,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{uid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ndate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{total,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gnames,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{note,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{statecn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gcounts,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into wct_bill
id,
gids,
user,
uid,
ndate,
total,
gnames,
address,
note,
statecn,
gcounts,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},

#{ndate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

mapper.update:
update wct_bill
gids = #{gids,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user = #{user,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
uid = #{uid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ndate = #{ndate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
total = #{total,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
gnames = #{gnames,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
address = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
note = #{note,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
statecn = #{statecn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
gcounts = #{gcounts,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update wct_bill set gids = #{gids,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user = #{user,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, uid = #{uid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ndate = #{ndate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, total = #{total,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, gnames = #{gnames,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, address = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, note = #{note,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, statecn = #{statecn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, gcounts = #{gcounts,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
